zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Braithwaite於1537年出生在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德時，他的父親Robert Braithwaite56歲，母親Alice Williamson26歲。他於1567年與Dorothy Bindloss在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1610年在英國維斯特莫藍德波內希德享年73歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Braithwaite于1537年出生在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德时，他的父亲Robert Braithwaite56岁，母亲Alice Williamson26岁。他于1567年与Dorothy Bindloss在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1610年在英国維斯特莫藍德波內希德享年73岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Braithwaite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Cumbria and Yorkshire named Braithwaite, from Old Norse breithr ‘broad’ + thveit ‘clearing’.

variants.name: Brathwaite
meanings: English: variant of   Braithwaite  . This form of the surname is frequent in Barbados, and in Trinidad and Tobago.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Braithwaite was born in 1537, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert Braithwaite, was 56 and his mother, Alice Williamson, was 26. He married Dorothy Bindloss in 1567, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1610, in Burneside, Westmorland, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Kendal, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Braithwaite est né en 1537, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Braithwaite, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Alice Williamson, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Bindloss en 1567, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1610, à Burneside, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Braithwaite 1537 in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Braithwaite 56 und seine Mutter Alice Williamson 26. Er hat 1567 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Dorothy Bindloss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1610 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Burneside, Westmorland, England und wurde in Kendal, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Braithwaite è nato il nel 1537 nel Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert Braithwaite, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Alice Williamson, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Bindloss nel 1567, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1610, nel Burneside, Westmorland, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Kendal, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Braithwaiteが1537年にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで生まれた時，父Robert Braithwaiteは56歳，母Alice Williamsonは26歳であった。1567年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドでDorothy Bindlossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1610年にイギリスウエストモーランドブルネシドで73歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドケンダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Braithwaite(이)가 1537년 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Braithwaite(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Williamson(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 Dorothy Bindloss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 버네시드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에 묻혔다.

mn.Burneside, England: Burneside, Cumbria, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Braithwaite nasceu em 1537, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Braithwaite, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Alice Williamson, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Bindloss em 1567, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1610, em Burneside, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Braithwaite родился в 1537 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Braithwaite было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Williamson, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Bindloss в 1567 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1610 г. в местности бурнесид, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Braithwaite nació en 1537, en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Braithwaite, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Alice Williamson, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Dorothy Bindloss en 1567, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1610, en Burneside, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
